title: CS2 Addon
description: This Minecraft mod brings the basic gameplay loop for CS2 games to Minecraft.
body:
This mod brings the basic CS2 gameplay loop to Minecraft; you can set up a game with multiple commands like:

- /setbombsite a/b pos1/pos2

- /setctspawn

- /setspawn

You'd start the match with:

- /startmatch

The max amount of players currently is 2; this mod is designed for 1v1 scenarios. This might be expanded on later on.

This mod requires both Timeless and Classics Zero and the unofficial port of Mr Crayfish's gun mod to 1.20.1.
(TACZ for the guns and CGM for the flashbang).
